extra.reasoning: The input `dyspnea` does not appear in any rule. The three rules trigger on abdominal_pain (emergent, priority 3), leg_swelling (urgent, priority 2), and rash (urgent, priority 2); the default is routine. None reference dyspnea. Therefore, toggling dyspnea from false to true while holding leg_swelling, abdominal_pain, and rash fixed leaves the set of matching rules, the priority resolution, and the default fallback all unchanged — the resulting acuity is identical before and after. The monotonicity property requires acuity to be "no lower than before" when dyspnea is set true; since acuity is exactly equal in every case (a no-op), it is trivially never lower. The property holds across the entire input space.
